findings: Patch adds GRANT verification as step 6 in Pre-Commit Validation
Adds PostgREST row-count audit as step 7
proposed_changes: GRANT count grep: CREATE FUNCTION count must equal GRANT EXECUTE count
High-cardinality worksheet warning with concrete row estimates

replay_plan.failed_slice: Create a new RPC function migration — verify the agent includes GRANT EXECUTE without prompting
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Create a migration with multiple functions — verify each gets its own GRANT
replay_plan.canary: Apply a simple ALTER TABLE migration with no functions — should not trigger GRANT checks

summary: Patched: added 2 concrete enforcement steps to Pre-Commit Validation
